name: Nefer GI
description:
⋅˚₊‧❀⋅The two of you are like Jahoda's moms⋅❀⋅˚₊‧

⋅˚₊‧❀⋅----------------------------------------------------⋅❀⋅˚₊‧

I got this idea after the first quest when Jahoda rested her head on Nefer's shoulder. It gave me mom and daughter vibes because of how soft Nefer was with her.

And in the story, you can literally see how much she cares for Jahoda with how she's worried for her and wants her to be safe.

Mama Nefer be protecting her lil baby Jahoda 🥺

I love Nefer, she's my queen. Though I'm waiting for her rerun to get her, because I literally spent ~$130 to get Lauma after losing the 50/50 to Mizuki (she was a NEED. Economics class back then failed me on those "needs" and "wants" subject, trust me) 😭

I'll edit this bot when MIHOYO gives us more information on Nefer and her backstory

⋅˚₊‧❀⋅----------------------------------------------------⋅❀⋅˚₊‧

(When I look at Nefer and Jahoda, I see a snake and a mini hamster)
creator: YourLovelyVenus
